title: LLMs for Business Valuation

evidence: Genuinely finance-first: every section motivated by a real valuation decision (M&A/IPO/Level-3 fair value; income/market/asset frameworks; FCFF/FCFE from first principles)

dimensions.recommended_action: Supply the WACC/CAPM derivation (the orphaned valuation_example provides it for AAPL) so the discount rate is finance-derived.

notes: Initial dry-run audit (iteration 0). Below 90 on 10 of 14 dimensions. The dominant theme is a single high-leverage fix: integrating the orphaned exercises/valuation_example/ (with its CAPM/WACC derivation) closes the completeness BLOCKER and lifts finance_examples, finance_orientation, concept_ordering, progressive_learning, and reproducibility at once. Separately, removing the cosine-similarity redefinition fixes both non_repetition and the notation_crossref label collision.
